Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE after the execution of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE is performed in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that restart with a new Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE within 7 days
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE after a rejection by any approver (e.g., ADMINISTRATION, SUPERVISOR, PRE_APPROVER, BUDGET OWNER)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time it takes Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE to be done following a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that eventually lead to a successful Payment Handled versus those that end in repeated rejections
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE when the variant includes Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time until Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE is performed in cases originating from domestic declarations (inferred via case:Amount or process context)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE after Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in high-frequency rejection loops
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'
